title: nonatelia oligantha
intro: Nonatelia oligantha, a lesser-known plant species, is a type of herbaceous perennial that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing skin irritations. Nonatelia oligantha is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
